meaning: n.切尔西(伦敦自治城市,为文艺界人士聚居地)
examples: Chelsea are playing away this Saturday.
It was the first goal he had scored since his transfer from Chelsea.
Chelsea Fearce is seventeen years old.
With Gael Clichy also out, Armand Traore could deputise at left-back when Arsenal host Chelsea on Sunday.
Triyoga Chelsea, on the other hand, is a beautiful, clean and airy space opened by lawyer-turned-yogi Jonathan Sattin.
